heading: General jurisdiction
label: 13521 General jurisdiction
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10541 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 10541 of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)

children.text: by water carrier between a place in a State and a place in another State, even if part of the transportation is outside the United States;

children.label: A
children.text: by motor carrier that is in the United States; and

children.label: B
children.text: by water carrier that is from a place in the United States to another place in the United States; and

children.label: A
children.text: when the transportation is by motor carrier, the transportation is provided in the United States;

children.label: B
children.text: when the transportation is by water carrier to a place outside the United States, the transportation is provided by water carrier from a place in the United States to another place in the United States before transshipment from a place in the United States to a place outside the United States; and

children.label: C
children.text: when the transportation is by water carrier from a place outside the United States, the transportation is provided by water carrier from a place in the United States to another place in the United States after transshipment to a place in the United States from a place outside the United States.

children.heading: .—Definitions
children.label: b .—Definitions
children.text: In this section, the terms “State” and “United States” include the territories and possessions of the United States.
